ast.name: desc

Adds an arrow element.
Arrowheads: "arrow"|"bar"|"circle"|"circle_outline"|"triangle"|"triangle_outline"|"diamond"|"diamond_outline"|null.
Bindings: "inside" | "outside" Sets startObjectId/endObjectId to bind the arrow ends to shapes. Bind mode: "orbit" (default) or "inside".
Fixed point: [xRatio,yRatio] in 0..1 (percentage of bound element width/height) to bind to a specific point on the element. In case of orbit mode, the orbit will happen around this immaginary point.
Elbowed: true will create an elbowed arrow.
ast.target:
添加箭头元素。
箭头类型："arrow"|"bar"|"circle"|"circle_outline"|"triangle"|"triangle_outline"|"diamond"|"diamond_outline"|null。
绑定："inside" | "outside" 设置startObjectId/endObjectId以将箭头末端绑定到形状。绑定模式："orbit"（默认）或"inside"。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
imageFile may be a TFile or a string containing an http(s)/ftp/file hyperlink, a vault path, or a data URL such as 'data:image/png;base64,...'.
imageFile may also be an obsidian filepath including a reference eg.: 'path/my.pdf#page=3'
Set scale to false if you want to embed the image at 100% of its original size. Default is true which will insert a scaled image.
anchor will only be evaluated if scale is false. anchor true will add |100% to the end of the filename, resulting in an image that will always pop back to 100% when the source file is updated or when the Excalidraw file is reopened.
colorMap is only used for SVG images and nested Excalidraw images. See the Shade Master script and the Deconstruct Selected Elements script for examples using colorMap.
type ColorMap = { [color: string]: string; }
ast.target:
imageFile可以是TFile或包含http(s)/ftp/file超链接、库路径或数据URL（例如'data:image/png;base64,...'）的字符串。
imageFile也可以是包含引用的obsidian文件路径，例如：'path/my.pdf#page=3'。
如果希望以原始大小的100%嵌入图像，请将scale设置为false。默认为true，将插入缩放后的图像。
仅当scale为false时才会评估anchor。anchor为true将在文件名末尾添加|100%，导致图像在源文件更新或Excalidraw文件重新打开时始终弹回100%。
colorMap仅用于SVG图像和嵌套的Excalidraw图像。有关使用colorMap的示例，请参阅Shade Master脚本和Deconstruct Selected Elements脚本。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Sets the target view for EA. All the view operations and the access to Excalidraw API will be performed on this view. Typically you will use setView() (to pick a sensible default) or setView(excalidrawView) (to explicitly target a specific view).
"auto" is equivalent to calling setView() and can read nicer when you want to show the view (e.g. setView("auto", true)).
"active" and "first" are deprecated and are kept for backward compatibility.
If view is null or undefined (or "auto"), EA will pick a sensible default: first the currently active Excalidraw view (if any), otherwise the last active Excalidraw view (if it is still available), otherwise the "first" Excalidraw view in the workspace.
If show is true, the view will be brought to front and focused.
If "first" is provided, the target will be the first Excalidraw view returned by Obsidian's workspace leaf collection (i.e., the first item in getExcalidrawViews()). This ordering is managed by Obsidian and does not necessarily match what a user would consider the “first” view; from a user's perspective it may appear random.
If "active" is provided, the currently active Excalidraw view in the workspace will be used. If that is not available, then the last active Excalidraw view will be used.
The function returns the ExcalidrawView that was set as targetView.
ast.target:
设置EA的目标视图。所有视图操作和对Excalidraw API的访问都将在此视图上执行。通常您将使用setView()（选择一个合理的默认值）或setView(excalidrawView)（明确指定特定视图）。
"auto"等同于调用setView()，当您想要显示视图时（例如setView("auto", true)），可读性更好。
"active"和"first"已弃用，保留是为了向后兼容。
如果view为null或undefined（或"auto"），EA将选择一个合理的默认值：首先当前活动的Excalidraw视图（如果有），否则最后活动的Excalidraw视图（如果仍然可用），否则工作区中的"第一个"Excalidraw视图。
如果show为true，视图将前置并聚焦。
如果提供"first"，目标将是Obsidian工作区叶子集合返回的第一个Excalidraw视图（即getExcalidrawViews()中的第一项）。此排序由Obsidian管理，不一定与用户认为的“第一个”视图匹配；从用户的角度来看，它可能看起来是随机的。
如果提供"active"，将使用工作区中当前活动的Excalidraw视图。如果不可用，则使用最后活动的Excalidraw视图。
函数返回设置为targetView的ExcalidrawView。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Updates the color map of an SVG image element in the view. If a ColorMap is provided, it will be used directly. If an SVGColorInfo is provided, it will be converted to a ColorMap. The view will be marked as dirty (i.e. will be saved at next scheduled time) and the image will be reset using the color map.
See "Shade Master" scritp in Script Library for an example of using this function.

type SVGColorInfo = Map<string, { mappedTo: string; fill: boolean; stroke: boolean; }>
type ColorMap = { [color: string]: string; invertInDarkMode?: boolean; }
ast.target:
更新视图中SVG图像元素的颜色映射。如果提供了ColorMap，则直接使用。如果提供了SVGColorInfo，则将其转换为ColorMap。视图将被标记为脏（即将在下一个计划时间保存），并使用颜色映射重置图像。
有关使用此函数的示例，请参阅脚本库中的"Shade Master"脚本。

type SVGColorInfo = Map<string, { mappedTo: string; fill: boolean; stroke: boolean; }>
type ColorMap = { [color: string]: string; invertInDarkMode?: boolean; }

ast.name: desc
desc
ast.source:
This function must be awaited. Retrieves the color map for an SVG image element. The color map contains information about the fill and stroke colors used in the SVG. If the element already has a color map, it will be merged with the colors extracted from the SVG.
See "Shade Master" scritp in Script Library for an example of using this function.

type SVGColorInfo = Map<string, { mappedTo: string; fill: boolean; stroke: boolean; }>
ast.target:
此函数必须等待。检索SVG图像元素的颜色映射。颜色映射包含有关SVG中使用的填充和描边颜色的信息。如果元素已有颜色映射，则将其与从SVG提取的颜色合并。
有关使用此函数的示例，请参阅脚本库中的"Shade Master"脚本。

type SVGColorInfo = Map<string, { mappedTo: string; fill: boolean; stroke: boolean; }>

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Must be awaited. Extracts the fill (background) and stroke colors from an excalidraw file and returns them as an SVGColorInfo. The SVGColorInfo is a map where the keys are the colors used in the SVG and the values contain information about whether the color is used for fill, stroke, or both.
See "Shade Master" scritp in Script Library for an example of using this function.

type SVGColorInfo = Map<string, { mappedTo: string; fill: boolean; stroke: boolean; }>
ast.target:
必须等待。从excalidraw文件中提取填充（背景）和描边颜色，并作为SVGColorInfo返回。SVGColorInfo是一个映射，其中键是SVG中使用的颜色，值包含有关该颜色是用于填充、描边还是两者的信息。
有关使用此函数的示例，请参阅脚本库中的"Shade Master"脚本。

type SVGColorInfo = Map<string, { mappedTo: string; fill: boolean; stroke: boolean; }>

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Extracts the fill and stroke colors from an SVG string and returns them as an SVGColorInfo. The SVGColorInfo is a map where the keys are the colors used in the SVG and the values contain information about whether the color is used for fill, stroke, or both.
See "Shade Master" scritp in Script Library for an example of using this function.

type SVGColorInfo = Map<string, { mappedTo: string; fill: boolean; stroke: boolean; }>
ast.target:
从SVG字符串中提取填充和描边颜色，并作为SVGColorInfo返回。SVGColorInfo是一个映射，其中键是SVG中使用的颜色，值包含有关该颜色是用于填充、描边还是两者的信息。
有关使用此函数的示例，请参阅脚本库中的"Shade Master"脚本。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Adds elements from elementsDict to the current view
repositionToCursor: default is false
save: default is true
newElementsOnTop: default is false, i.e. the new elements get to the bottom of the stack
newElementsOnTop controls whether elements created with ExcalidrawAutomate are added at the bottom of the stack or the top of the stack of elements already in the view
Note that elements copied to the view with copyViewElementsToEAforEditing retain their position in the stack of elements in the view even if modified using EA
captureUpdate controls undo/redo capture: 'IMMEDIATELY' records immediately (use for local updates), 'NEVER' skips undo tracking (remote/init changes), and 'EVENTUALLY' defers capture as part of multi-step async flows.
ast.target:
将elementsDict中的元素添加到当前视图
repositionToCursor: 默认为false
save: 默认为true
newElementsOnTop: 默认为false，即新元素位于堆栈底部
newElementsOnTop控制使用ExcalidrawAutomate创建的元素是添加到视图中已有元素堆栈的底部还是顶部
请注意，使用copyViewElementsToEAforEditing复制到视图的元素即使使用EA修改，也会保留其在视图元素堆栈中的位置
captureUpdate控制撤销/重做捕获：'IMMEDIATELY'立即记录（用于本地更新），'NEVER'跳过撤销跟踪（远程/初始化更改），'EVENTUALLY'延迟捕获作为多步异步流程的一部分。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
This asynchronous function should be awaited. It retrieves the filepath to a new file, taking into account the attachments preference settings in Obsidian. If the attachment folder doesn't exist, it creates it. The function returns the complete path to the file. If the provided filename already exists, the function will append '_[number]' before the extension to generate a unique filename.Prompts the user with a dialog to select new file action.
- create markdown file
- create excalidraw file
- cancel action
The new file will be relative to this.targetView.file.path, unless parentFile is provided. If shouldOpenNewFile is true, the new file will be opened in a workspace leaf. targetPane controls which leaf will be used for the new file.
Returns the TFile for the new file or null if the user cancelled the action.
type PaneTarget = "active-pane"|"new-pane"|"popout-window"|"new-tab"|"md-properties";
ast.target:
此异步函数应被等待。它检索新文件的文件路径，同时考虑Obsidian中的附件偏好设置。如果附件文件夹不存在，则创建它。该函数返回文件的完整路径。如果提供的文件名已存在，则函数将在扩展名之前附加'_[number]'以生成唯一的文件名。提示用户通过对话框选择新文件操作。
- 创建markdown文件
- 创建excalidraw文件
- 取消操作
新文件将相对于this.targetView.file.path，除非提供了parentFile。如果shouldOpenNewFile为true，则新文件将在工作区叶子中打开。targetPane控制将使用哪个叶子来打开新文件。
返回新文件的TFile，如果用户取消了操作则返回null。
type PaneTarget = "active-pane"|"new-pane"|"popout-window"|"new-tab"|"md-properties";

ast.source:
This asynchronous function should be awaited. It posts the supplied request to the currently configured AI provider and returns a normalized OpenAI-compatible response payload for backwards compatibility.
AIRequest supports these fields:
{ provider?, baseURL?, apiKey?, model?, image?, text?, instruction?, systemPrompt?, messages?, temperature?, maxOutgoingTokens?, maxTokens?, imageGenerationProperties? }
provider: optional override for the configured provider. Supported values are openai, anthropic, google, xai, and openai-compatible.
baseURL: optional request-level provider base URL override. Use this for local models, custom gateways, or temporary endpoint switching.
apiKey: optional request-level API key override.
model: optional request-level model override. This applies to text, vision, and image-generation requests.
image: either a data URL string or {url:string}|{dataURL:string}. Use this with vision requests or image edits.
text: the main user prompt.
instruction: optional extra user instruction appended after the main prompt.
systemPrompt: optional system message.
messages: optional chat history in the form {role:"system"|"user"|"assistant", content:string | [{type:"text", text:string} | {type:"image", image:string | {url:string}|{dataURL:string}} | {type:"file", file:string | {url:string}|{dataURL:string}} | {type:"audio", audio:string | {url:string}|{dataURL:string}}]}.
This enables chat-style interfaces by preserving prior turns in messages, similar to Mermaid chat.
temperature: optional generation control.
maxOutgoingTokens: optional approximate budget for outgoing text content. Excalidraw trims older text content first while keeping the latest messages and attached files.
maxTokens: optional response-size limit.
imageGenerationProperties: { size?, quality?, n?, mask? }. If present, Excalidraw uses the image generation/edit pipeline. mask accepts the same format as image.
File support by provider: Google accepts inline file/audio parts such as PDFs and voice clips. Anthropic currently accepts PDF document parts. OpenAI/OpenAI-compatible/xAI remain limited to text plus images in the current chat-completions pipeline.
RequestUrlResponse returns:
{ status:number, headers:Record, text:string, json:any, arrayBuffer:ArrayBuffer }
For text models, json is normalized to an OpenAI-style chat completion object, so existing scripts can continue reading json.choices[0].message.content. For image models, json preserves the image endpoint response such as json.data[0].url.
ast.target:
此异步函数应被等待。它将提供的请求发布到当前配置的AI提供程序，并返回标准化的OpenAI兼容响应负载以实现向后兼容。
AIRequest支持以下字段：
{ provider?, baseURL?, apiKey?, model?, image?, text?, instruction?, systemPrompt?, messages?, temperature?, maxOutgoingTokens?, maxTokens?, imageGenerationProperties? }
provider：可选覆盖已配置的提供程序。支持的值有openai、anthropic、google、xai和openai-compatible。
baseURL：可选的请求级提供程序基础URL覆盖。用于本地模型、自定义网关或临时端点切换。
apiKey：可选的请求级API密钥覆盖。
model：可选的请求级模型覆盖。这适用于文本、视觉和图像生成请求。
image：可以是数据URL字符串或{url:string}|{dataURL:string}。用于视觉请求或图像编辑。
text：主要用户提示。
instruction：可选附加用户指令，附加在主提示之后。
systemPrompt：可选的系统消息。
messages：可选的聊天历史，格式为{role:"system"|"user"|"assistant", content:string | [{type:"text", text:string} | {type:"image", image:string | {url:string}|{dataURL:string}} | {type:"file", file:string | {url:string}|{dataURL:string}} | {type:"audio", audio:string | {url:string}|{dataURL:string}}]}。
这通过保留messages中的先前轮次来实现聊天式界面，类似于Mermaid聊天。
temperature：可选的生成控制。
maxOutgoingTokens：可选的传出文本内容近似预算。Excalidraw首先修剪较旧的文本内容，同时保留最新消息和附加文件。
maxTokens：可选的响应大小限制。
imageGenerationProperties：{ size?, quality?, n?, mask? }。如果存在，Excalidraw使用图像生成/编辑管道。mask接受与image相同的格式。
提供程序的文件支持：Google接受内联文件/音频部分，如PDF和语音剪辑。Anthropic目前接受PDF文档部分。OpenAI/OpenAI兼容/xAI在当前聊天完成管道中仍仅限于文本加图像。
RequestUrlResponse返回：
{ status:number, headers:Record, text:string, json:any, arrayBuffer:ArrayBuffer }
对于文本模型，json被规范化为OpenAI风格的聊天完成对象，因此现有脚本可以继续读取json.choices[0].message.content。对于图像模型，json保留图像端点响应，如json.data[0].url。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Returns the sanitized AI configuration currently available to ExcalidrawAutomate scripts.
The returned object includes enabled state, provider profiles with provider, baseURL, and hasApiKey, the configured text/image model maps, the default text/image model IDs, and the default outgoing/response token budgets.
Use this instead of reading ea.plugin.settings directly when building AI-driven scripts.
ast.target:
返回当前可用于ExcalidrawAutomate脚本的经过清理的AI配置。
返回的对象包括启用状态、提供程序配置文件（包含provider、baseURL和hasApiKey）、配置的文本/图像模型映射、默认文本/图像模型ID以及默认传出/响应令牌预算。
在构建AI驱动脚本时，请使用此方法而不是直接读取ea.plugin.settings。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Calls the ExcalidrawAPI updateScene function for the targetView. When restore=true, excalidraw will try to correct errors in the scene such as setting default values to missing element properties. Use captureUpdate to control undo/redo behavior: 'IMMEDIATELY' for immediate undoable updates (most local changes), 'NEVER' for updates that should never be undoable, or 'EVENTUALLY' for updates that should be undoable as part of an async multi-step process. See the ExcalidrawAPI documentation for more information.
ast.target: 为targetView调用ExcalidrawAPI的updateScene函数。当restore=true时，excalidraw将尝试纠正场景中的错误，例如为缺失的元素属性设置默认值。使用captureUpdate控制撤销/重做行为：'IMMEDIATELY'用于立即可撤销的更新（大多数本地更改），'NEVER'用于永远不应可撤销的更新，或'EVENTUALLY'用于应作为异步多步骤过程的一部分可撤销的更新。有关更多信息，请参阅ExcalidrawAPI文档。
